{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322190900EA17CB7BEB424F5A8A5C"}"},"total":527},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7363217747110445886","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"突然发现美人的名字打错了[害羞][害羞]是这个骰美人啦[注意][注意]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714386938,"group_id":"7216633113990925351","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1486184925111308"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7216633113990925351","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"983"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":116811,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7363217711098725182","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看！！！刚刚才发现已经更到了1000章了，从六十多章开始追的，完全没想到追了这么久，真的很好看啊啊啊啊。从来没有追一本书这么久还没腻，关键是还没有腻，还没腻啊啊啊！！！平时都是追个几十章好多都弃了，这本真的很好看，超级好看。无论是阿窍和鹘美人之间的感情戏，还是配角之间的关系，还有剧情真的写的好好看的[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714386674,"group_id":"7216633113990925351","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人家是女孩子(不可改！！！）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1om0oaZzRPy94CniTUBxJf63DbpOwBuWtvsGPf5mEc7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/4805bf3b3ee54599a721eacef0393d21~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710314&x-signature=4rxQhCd5KEv4iN9%2FUTcHze7fPhY%3D","user_id":"1486184925111308","user_name":"玖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1486184925111308","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662612934,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7216633113990925351","book_info":{"abstract":"看本书要脑子！！要一定的基本知识储备！！（推荐高中学历，初中学历就能看得懂当我没说，天才特权通道走一个～）
【无限流+爽文+团宠+空间+囤货+末日游戏+国家队+双洁双强1v1】
【懵懂可爱成长版系统X妖孽美貌白切黑玩家】
❅女主是，系统！女频

曲窍是三千星域神明考核里的未成年F系统，意外绑定超好看的美人宿主，进入游戏果断认爹。

家人们谁懂啊，有个很能打的宿主爹爹是一种怎样体验？

当然是爱干啥干啥，只有她想不到的，没有她不敢做的。

关键是美人不仅长得好看，说话又温柔，情绪还稳定，上得了战场下得了厨房，在其他能点技能点满情况下，剩余的属性全部堆了颜值。

就是天生运气不好，各种小概率事件都能碰上——欧能很欧，但非起来挡都挡不住。

『男主视角』

一朝遇到个洋娃娃似的小系统，古灵精怪思维跳脱，大的小的啥都不懂拽着自己问东问西，偏偏眼界视野高的让人惊奇。

刚开始，骰迹感觉自己遇上了个不得了的麻烦。

后来又过了很久才发现，藏在万千星海错乱时空间的女孩，是他心心念念、失而复得的独一瑰宝。

"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"896853698165872","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"983"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322190900EA17CB7BEB424F5A8A5C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":116811,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":5293},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1714387542,"author_reply_time":1714387366,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7320236374794421046","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大写的文章特别好看，毕竟我读番茄已经三年了这算是番茄文里面我最喜欢的类型之一了毕竟我一般看书有时候看一半就不看了，特别挑，这还是我第一次把它阅读完的，以我老书虫的评价我感觉挺好看的。男女主的感情线虽然发展慢，但是主线发展的快，不会让人感觉感情线抢了主线的发展故事，男女主一上来，金手指没那么大而是越往后慢慢成长上来的，感情线和主线都挺好看的，作者大大，加油吧[送心][飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":171,"s":168,"text":"都挺好","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741777404F5A8A5C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227320236374794421046%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227216633113990925351%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704376190,"group_id":"7216633113990925351","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+lkCcfnZ6mUv5WPWGWYg2jYmfAvXwRcCSpr3TDr71BP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ce8fede1f2a14aae9900b8e9d6b9aebe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144 大大好棒呀加油加油宝宝꒰ᵔ•̀з•́ᵔ꒱"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712637483,"group_id":"7216633113990925351","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1838005280579092"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7216633113990925351","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"90"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5592,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7328052540233990966","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此！书！不！该！被！埋！没！
这甚至比九点几的小说好看多了呜呜呜番茄你的评分是不是有点问题啊www
我觉得感情线水到渠成恰到好处！一！点！都！不！突！兀！不会一上来就爱的要死要活的，女主的性格就很可爱乖巧懂事有计谋，男主漠视众生清冷孤傲冷艳高贵的气质（直视我宰种的那种）真的很戳我啊（天知道我找了多久这样的人设
小故事也很有吸引力不会和很多无限流相似的题材 整体我觉得蛮有趣不会特别恐怖哈哈哈非常适合我这种又菜有爱看的人

我从来没有写过书评 但是这本真的太好看了然评分为什么会这么低呀我的宝 作为喜欢看无限流有感情线的读者我觉得这本书真的是撞到了我的xp上了希望这本书可以在未来大放光彩！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706196266,"group_id":"7216633113990925351","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天天开心呀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5YZyvGHr1FXuTP4hK1YLAKJSDVhyQ2srkY2dwTQGU5n","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f76455f816914ce78295d1f3d9a7f5b2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702417&x-signature=4TTa4ZaETtw%2BQebp1s6MCSXmvzg%3D","user_id":"1838005280579092","user_name":"书宁y"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1838005280579092","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7216633113990925351","book_info":{"abstract":"看本书要脑子！！要一定的基本知识储备！！（推荐高中学历，初中学历就能看得懂当我没说，天才特权通道走一个～）

刚开始，骰迹感觉自己遇上了个不得了的麻烦。

后来又过了很久才发现，藏在万千星海错乱时空间的女孩，是他心心念念、失而复得的独一瑰宝。
